data.title: John Kim Maintains Hold on Alexandria Equities, Keeps Price Target Unchanged at $52 Amid Near-Term Weakness and Long-Term Offsets
data.description:
John Kim, an analyst from BMO Capital, maintained the Hold rating on Alexandria Equities. The associated price target remains the same with $52.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

John Kim has given his Hold rating due to a combination of factors related to Alexandria Equities’ deteriorating near‑term fundamentals and offsetting long‑term strengths. The company reported its weakest life science leasing metrics in a decade, with sharply lower leasing volumes, a meaningful drop in occupancy, negative cash NOI growth, and a downward revision to its FFO guidance, while also flagging substantial additional tenant move‑outs expected in 2027.

At the same time, Kim acknowledges positives that prevent a more negative stance, including strong pre‑leasing on 2027–2028 development projects, management’s expectation of a sizable rebound in leasing activity next quarter, and a very manageable debt maturity profile following recent repayments. Given this mix of cyclical headwinds and supportive balance sheet and development trends, he maintains a neutral posture and keeps his price target unchanged at $52, viewing the risk‑reward as balanced at current levels.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk

data.title: Sun Communities: Buy Rating Reiterated on Strong Q1, Raised 2026 Core FFO Outlook; Price Target Maintained at $140
data.description:
BMO Capital analyst John Kim maintained a Buy rating on Sun Communities today and set a price target of $140.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

John Kim has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors including Sun Communities’ stronger-than-expected first-quarter results and improved full-year outlook. The company lifted its 2026 Core FFO per share forecast above consensus to $6.97, supported by robust North American same-property performance and incremental gains from interest income, lower interest expense, and higher brokerage commissions.

Kim also highlights the stability in RV and U.K. operations, as management maintained RV NOI and U.K. NOI guidance despite macro headwinds, and modestly increased North American same-property NOI expectations. Additional support for the Buy rating comes from active capital allocation, including the repurchase of 500,000 shares, while he acknowledges some offsetting negatives such as slightly higher expense growth and second-quarter guidance coming in just below Street expectations, with the price target unchanged at $140.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
